meaning: n.(尤指已去骨切片供烹调用的)鳕鱼的幼鱼
examples: He ensured the menu in the corporate dining room offered healthful fare, including his favorite dish, baked scrod.
The original menu, still on the wall, was scant, just oysters, clams and scallops, but today choices are vast, from stuffed lobster and traditional Boston scrod to pork chops and pastas.
